section.heading: Joint Forces Staff College: duration of principal course of instruction

subsection.heading: Duration.—
subsection.content: The duration of the principal course of instruction offered at the Joint Forces Staff College may not be less than 10 weeks of resident instruction.

subsection.heading: Definition.—
subsection.content: In this section, the term “principal course of instruction” means any course of instruction offered at the Joint Forces Staff College as Phase II joint professional military education.
